evidence.description: PROP-EPNS-014 says Clock.now() is NOT called on SwitchError path, but behavioral-spec.md:294 says dirty-fail=1 and implementation calls clockNow once. Proof obligation contradicts spec.
Dirty (save fails) row in Clock budget table shows total=1 for NoteSaveFailed.occurredOn.
All classification edge cases covered: idle, empty, whitespace-only, dirty, save-failed with/without pendingNextNoteId, saving/switching throws, null-note throws. Sprint 2 FIND-004/005 resolved.

Integration tests cover no-current, empty, dirty-success, dirty-fail, same-note, save-failed-retry-success, save-failed-retry-fail paths. Event ordering verified for empty and dirty-success paths. Three minor gaps remain (FIND-004/005/006) but no critical or major edge case omissions.

previousFrontmatter is declared optional (?:) but the spec and pipeline input type require it. Optional parameter allows callers to omit it without type errors, silently coercing undefined to null at line 64.

Module structure is clean: pure classify function with no port dependencies (lines 23-67), private isEmpty helper (lines 69-73). Sprint 2 FIND-003 resolved: isEmpty removed from signature, function arity is 2.
Pipeline orchestration is well-structured: pre-guard → classify → flush → startNewSession. SameNoteNoOp vs NewSession discrimination is clean. Port threading is explicit.
PROP-EPNS-001: 1000-run property test with valid (state, note) pairs. Sprint 2 FIND-006 resolved: arbValidStateAndNote generates idle→null, editing→Note, save-failed→Note pairs correctly.

PROP-EPNS-003: Property test uses direct classifyCurrentSession call, testing the production isEmpty implementation (no injection needed since isEmpty is now a private module function). Sprint 2 FIND-006 concern about isEmpty injection is no longer applicable.
PROP-EPNS-005: Tier-0 compile-time exhaustiveness check with never branch. Verified at both pipeline.test.ts (lines 53-63) and dedicated harness.

sprint2ResolutionStatus.FIND-001_clockBudgetDirtyFail: RESOLVED — spec updated to dirty-fail=1, implementation and tests match
sprint2ResolutionStatus.FIND-002_selectedNoteIdNullGuard: RESOLVED — explicit null check at flush-current-session.ts:84-87
sprint2ResolutionStatus.FIND-003_isEmptyRemovedFromSignature: RESOLVED — classifyCurrentSession now (state, note) with private isEmpty at line 70
sprint2ResolutionStatus.FIND-004_nullNoteThrows: RESOLVED — throws at lines 33-36 and 49-52, tests at step1 lines 187-196
sprint2ResolutionStatus.FIND-006_propertyTestValidPairs: RESOLVED — arbValidStateAndNote generates correct pairs in prop-001
